title: A Heart Full of Distance
content: Distance has a strange way of changing time. Days without seeing each other feel endless, while weekends together disappear before either person notices. For nearly two years, Lily and Ethan built their relationship through phone calls, video chats, and carefully planned visits. Friends often asked how they managed to stay so close while living so far apart. They usually smiled because the answer was difficult to explain. Love had become less about physical presence and more about consistency. It was choosing to listen after exhausting days, remembering small details, celebrating achievements from hundreds of kilometers away, and believing that temporary separation did not define their future. By the time they finally moved to the same city, they realized the greatest distance they had overcome had never been measured in miles, but in patience.
